name: AI Level Builder
description: Generate and build levels using AI text strings! Generate the string with a prompt at https://ailevelbuilder.lovable.app
about:
Bring your layout ideas to life! Use our companion web page to generate perfect structure layouts using custom prompts. Choose iconic styles like Bloodbath, sync gameplay directly to a song's BPM, and paste the code straight into the editor to build your map instantly.

Special thanks to the community for testing!
